pattern: Weave two sublists in place — one of odd-position nodes, one of even-position nodes — by relinking alternating next pointers, then splice the even chain onto the tail of the odd chain.
hints: Positions are counted from one, so the 1st, 3rd, 5th... nodes form one group and the 2nd, 4th, 6th... form another, with order preserved inside each group.
Maintain two running tails — an odd tail and an even tail — and step them forward together, each grabbing the node two ahead of it.

Keep a reference to the head of the even group; after the weave, point the last odd node's next at that even head and terminate the even group with null. Handle the empty or single-node list up front.

edge_inputs.description: two nodes — already in odd-then-even order, must stay
negative values preserved in grouped order

stress.description: long random list to confirm O(1)-space relinking holds at scale

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def oddEvenList(self, head):
        if not head or not head.next:
            return head
        odd = head
        even = head.next
        even_head = even
        while even and even.next:
            odd.next = even.next
            odd = odd.next
            even.next = odd.next
            even = even.next
        odd.next = even_head
        return head
